features: BIC's iconic razor for men is your tried and trusted friend since 1975 for a solid, reliable shave, sold as a pack of 20
Simple and practical single-blade razor is the perfect choice for men wanting a straightforward efficient shave
The iconic orange handle is easy to use and handle for a quick shaving experience
A fixed razor head keeps things simple; providing you maximum control when you shave
description: Product Description The original BIC single razor is the iconic 1 blade razor for men, first launched in 1975. This makes the BIC 1 Sensitive men's razor a tried and tested all-rounder and one you can really rely on. Sold as a pack of 20, its distinctive orange handle is easy to handle and manoeuvre. A top-quality stainless steel blade, produced in BIC's own high-tech factories, provides an easy shave. , the single blade keeps things simple and prevents hair clogging. BIC has been designing razors for men for over 40 years, and they have come a long way – but for an easy shave and a familiar friend for your shaving routine, this is the one for you. Directions Unwrap the razor, wet the area to be shaved, apply shaving cream if desired, and move the razor gently along the skin in the direction of hair growth Manufacturer's Description A single blade disposable razor designed especially for those of us with sensitive skin. Extremely easy to use, there's no fuss - once you've finished with a razor simply dispose of it responsibly.
